title: Hybrid Delights
description: An addon mod between Hybrid Aquatic and Farmer's Delight
body:
This is a small addon that adds compatibility between Hybrid Aquatic and Farmer's Delight or [Let's Do] Farm And Charm.

**This mod will not add anything unless either Farmer's Delight or Farm And Charm is installed**

Currently it adds 12 new dishes using items from Hybrid Aquatic:
- Masgouf
- Crab Cake
- Crab Rangoon
- Eel Noodles
- Bisque
- Chowder
- Lobster Stew
- Fisherman's Soup
- Fisherman's Pie
- Tuna Casserole
- Tuna Sandwich
- Tuna Salad
